subcodes.title: Words to Saidol Molk, spoken on 1913-12-04
subcodes.first_line: In the coming of every prophet and messenger of God, this objection was uttered by the people of negation. Even Pharaoh
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i
